sections.title: Night Rounds
sections.what: Theo recognizes the second patient — a regular face — now rerouted to a diverted ward by Harte's bed policy. He cannot follow.

sections.title: The Locker
sections.what: Theo rereads his draft complaint alone. Maeve enters unexpectedly. He shuts the locker. Neither speaks about what matters.

sections.title: The Chapel
sections.what: Theo confesses the unfiled complaint to Agnes. She already knows the first death and names the second patient now deteriorating upstairs.

sections.title: The Summons
sections.what: Harte's assistant delivers the performance review notice mid-shift. Theo walks the admin corridor. The meeting has not started; the warning already has.

sections.title: Back on the Floor
sections.what: Theo returns. He checks the diverted patient's status through back channels. He pulls the complaint from his locker and reads it once more.

sections.title: Three Minutes to Six
sections.what: Theo dates the form but does not sign it. He puts it in his breast pocket. The shift continues around him.
